title: corylus colurna var. glandulifera
intro: Corylus colurna var. glandulifera, also known as the glandular filbert, is a variety of the hazelnut tree, characterized by its glandular hairs and edible nuts. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The nuts of the glandular filbert can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and are also used in food and cosmetic applications. In addition, the leaves and bark of the plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
